channel.title: Steam Deck on linuxrepos
channel.description: Recent content in Steam Deck on linuxrepos

item.title: Unlock Steam Deck
item.description: This article shows you how to make the steamdeck writable and a full blown desktop that you can install apps on that aren’t Flatpak, AppImage, or Snaps. Simply use yay -S packagename to install the app of your choice.
